problem: Catastrophic forgetting during LLM fine-tuning: optimizer drifts the model arbitrarily far from the pre-training manifold; momentum-based methods can accumulate phase-space volume errors that compound across steps.
sub_problems: P1: Define a phase-space invariant constraining optimizer drift
P2: Implement a time-reversible (symplectic) update for fine-tuning
P3: Use energy-conservation residual as gating signal
